## Skin Submission

**Type:** <!-- Manual PR / Automated submission / Crawl -->

### Checklist

- [ ] JSON file(s) placed in `skins/{system}/` directory
- [ ] `downloadURL` is publicly accessible (tested in browser)
- [ ] `id` is a unique 16-character hex string
- [ ] `systems` contains valid system codes
- [ ] Thumbnail URL included (optional but recommended)
- [ ] No duplicate `downloadURL` already in catalog
